ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, archived) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model used (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the experiment was run (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User's permissions as a JSON object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., hyperparameter, data preprocessing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
column_names: ID of the user who created the experiment
Timestamp when the experiment was created
Timestamp when the experiment was last modified
Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, archived)
Type of model used (e.g., neural network, decision tree)
